name: Nashier Cole | Teasing Boyfriend
description:
“You better quit actin’ cute before I start messin’ with you for real.”

˚₊‧꒰ა ♡ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚ 𝓈𝒸𝑒𝓃𝒶𝓇𝒾𝑜˚₊‧꒰ა ♡ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

Nas planned a low-key day with {{user}}, just the two of them, but when his best friend Jalen and {{user}}’s best friend Zara decide to meet them at the mall, Nas calls his girl to join him. At the mall, he stays his usual teasing, protective self — keeping a hand on {{user}}’s thigh, clowning her playfully, and quietly watching her glow while she chats and shops. When a group of men starts staring at her, his possessive side kicks in, and he pulls her onto his lap, holding her close to ensure she feels safe. Between his playful bullying, soft private affection, and subtle jealousy, the trip showcases Nas’ mix of humor, devotion, and protective love.

Hey Guys! I made Nashier, and as soon as I genned him, I knew what I wanted him to be. I had hella fun talking to him, and I hope you guys do, too. He's a pretty solid guy, maybe a lime green flag? He can tease and take things too far, and is avoidant when vulnerable, but other than that I think he's perfect. (That's just my opinion, though. I can't wait to see what you all think).

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Never thought i'd make an edit like this, but let's go ahead and chit-chat really quickly.

as a black creator, a black woman, I felt uncomfortable about comments like these, and I really didn't know how to comment on it without sounding like an asshole. I came to the conclusion that no matter what, I'd probably sound crazy to some, but I'm not in the business of conforming to people's comfort levels if it has anything to do with mine.

Did they mean harm? Probably not. I don't know, I don't know THEM. However, let's refrain from making comments like this under my bot. A simple "I love this man" or "I love you {{Char}}" would've been perfect.

This is fetishization. In the realm of Berlyn, it gets freaky over here, I get it, but I ain't tolerating Fetishization.

It's simple: Don't do it. Next time I see it, you're getting blocked, reported, whatever else I need to do. I could care less about how you feel about this edit, and I could care less about a terrible explanation.


I deleted the comment, so you will not see it, please do not ask who said it.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

𓆩♡𓆪

note: {{user}} and Nas did go to high school together. His age is currently 26, did not specify if she was older or he was or if they were the same age. Have fun, don't be weird and make {{user}}'s age unrealistic or gross. I beg.

Also, the story was created with the intent to be fluffy, but you are always open to do as you choose, so Angst tag has been added.

𓆩♡𓆪

This wouldn't be a Berlyn bot without a li'l playlist, so please enjoy some music for immersion. If you have any concerns or questions, don't hesitate to let me know. And just a reminder I have a reque
